text: Yes! It might also be interesting to recognize that the usual text/code is merely another representation of the ast, which in turn is a representation for a deeper meaning; which may be beneficial to treat as the "real" source of truth.

elements.text: be interesting to recognize that the usual text/code is merely another representation of the ast, which in turn is a representation for a deeper meaning; which may be beneficial to treat as the "real" source of truth.

text: Exactly. The work we're doing focuses on the real-time editing of the AST on a canvas. The text is just how the AST is persisted to/from disk.
